evidence: pytest passed: Hint selects a legal low-cost candidate when leading and following, and StatusMessage starts with Hint: plus a cost rationale.
gdUnit verification passed: CardRules scoring keeps legality as the gate and conserves bombs unless needed.
pytest passed: AI turn updates visible recent-play reason text and card counts while preserving current trick legality.
gdUnit verification passed: AI policy uses scored candidates and avoids wasting bombs when alternatives exist.
pytest passed: hand summary is visible and updates after deal, selection, play, and replay states.
gdUnit verification passed: summary reports count groups, chains, and remaining card count.
pytest passed: Help button opens a rules/help panel with supported combinations and flow rules, Close hides it, and gameplay resumes unchanged.
screenshot evidence captured without embedding images: e2e/screenshots/scene_main/v0_4_0_01_initial.png and e2e/screenshots/scene_main/v0_4_0_02_help.png

main.notes: Per user instruction, generated/image-review/VQA content was not embedded or reviewed in chat. E2E layout and help-affordance assertions passed, and screenshots were captured as file evidence for user acceptance.

minor_issues: v0.4.0 improves policy explanation and usability, while full expert Doudizhu AI, animation, and audio remain deferred by roadmap scope.
